name: Noodles & Company
description: Noodles & Company is an American fast-casual restaurant chain that specializes in globally inspired noodle dishes, pasta, soups, and salads. Founded in 1995 and headquartered in Broomfield, Colorado, the company focuses on providing made-to-order meals that cater to various dietary lifestyles and preferences. With hundreds of locations across the United States, Noodles & Company emphasizes fresh ingredients and culinary creativity, offering a diverse menu that ranges from traditional favorites like Mac & Cheese to contemporary, chef-curated bowls, all while maintaining a commitment to quality and value for their customers.
